title: AI Market Report
summary: Automated market brief generated by CryptoMarketz AI.
structure: Bitcoin and Ethereum remain the key structural assets to watch. Traders should monitor support and resistance closely while volatility remains elevated.
narratives: Market attention remains focused on AI, modular infrastructure, real world assets, and ecosystem rotation.
liquidity: Funding, open interest, and spot volumes suggest traders are still cautious and waiting for stronger confirmation.
whales: Large wallet activity should be tracked for signs of accumulation or distribution during volatility spikes.
macro: Macro conditions remain important, especially rate expectations, dollar strength, and broader risk sentiment.
risk: The key risk is continued downside pressure if liquidity weakens further and major support levels break.
